title: callista quadrangularis
intro: Callista quadrangularis, also known as the "Indian peninsular tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin problems. The health benefits of Callista quadrangularis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal decoction or infusion by boiling its roots or leaves in water, which can be taken orally to utilize its medicinal properties.
